name: calendula officinalis
title: calendula officinalis benefits
description: Calendula officinalis reduces inflammation, which is the body's natural response to injury or damage, characterized by the increased blood flow, heat, redness, and swelling in the affected area. This benefit is crucial as inflammation can lead to chronic conditions such as arthritis, acne, and eczema, which can significantly impact a person's quality of life and daily activities. The anti-inflammatory properties of calendula officinalis can be attributed to its rich content of bioactiv...
